label: What is the name of the event?
description: 🔖 Name your event like a pro! Keep it short, fun, and catchy.

label: What type of event is it?
description: 🎭 What kind of vibe? Choose your event type or drop your own!

label: When will it happen?
description: 📅 Lock the date & time — let everyone know when it's happening!

label: Where is the venue?
description: 🏟️ Enter the venue name — where all the action will take place!
placeholder: e.g. Main Auditorium, Block A Seminar Hall

label: Pick events for each category
description: 🎯 What's inside? Add activities from tech to dance, or create your own.

label: How are participants involved?
description: 👥 Tell us how users will participate — like solo entries, team battles, or open registration.

label: Which departments are organizing the event?
description: 🏫 Which departments are in? Pick all the organizers behind the scenes.

label: Event location (Coordinates)
description: 📍 Pin the spot! Drop your event's exact coordinates or use your current location.

label: Who is creating this event?
description: 🧑 Enter your name and contact info so others know who organized this event.

label: Upload Event Banner or Photo
description: 🖼️ Make your event stand out! Upload an eye-catching banner or poster.

label: Describe your event
description: 📝 Write a short story about your event — what's happening, who should attend, and why it's awesome!
placeholder: Example: Join us for an exciting tech showdown where minds meet machines!

label: Review & Create Event
description: ✅ Final check! Review everything before creating your awesome event.
